prediction.reasoning: Based on INTU's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, I estimate a 7-day standard deviation of around $12-15. The confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with widening ranges to reflect increasing uncertainty at higher confidence levels.
